short_description: Download & Save Rajwap Videos Easily for Offline Viewing (Browser Extension)
long_description: Downloader for RajWap is a focused browser extension that lets you save videos from RajWap video pages directly to your device. It works on Chrome, Edge, Brave, and Firefox, giving you a straightforward way to keep your favorite content available offline.

faqs.question: What browsers does Rajwap Downloader support?
faqs.answer: It works on Chrome, Edge, Brave, and Firefox. Check the latest release for browser-specific builds.

faqs.question: Do I need an account to use the extension?
faqs.answer: No account is required to start. The free trial lets you test the workflow without signing up.

faqs.question: Is there a limit on how many videos I can download?
faqs.answer: The free trial includes 3 downloads. A paid license removes this limit.

faqs.question: What video formats does the extension save?
faqs.answer: Files are saved as MP4, which is compatible with most media players and devices.

faqs.question: Can I use this extension on other websites?
faqs.answer: No, Rajwap Downloader is specifically built for rajwap.biz and its subdomains.

permissions.description: Archiving content you have permission to keep
Only download content you own or have explicit permission to save

features: Focused rajwap.biz and RajWap subdomain scope
Works on Chrome, Edge, Brave, and Firefox browsers
Simple popup interface for video detection and download
Saves files in widely compatible MP4 format
Includes 3 free downloads to test the workflow
Targeted rajwap.biz and RajWap subdomain support
Works on Chrome, Edge, Brave, and Firefox
Clean popup interface for detecting and downloading media
Detects video content from supported Rajwap video pages
Saves files in standard MP4 format
No account or registration required to start

why: Rajwap hosts a wide collection of video content, but the platform does not provide a built-in way to save videos for offline viewing. If your connection drops or you want to watch later without streaming, you are left without options.

Rajwap Downloader fills that gap by adding a simple download button to supported Rajwap video pages. Instead of relying on screen recording tools or third-party sites, you get a clean browser extension that detects the video and offers it as a downloadable MP4 file. It is built for one thing and one thing only: saving Rajwap videos when you need them.
how_it_works: Install the extension from the latest release.
Open Rajwap and go to a supported video page.
Start playback so the extension can detect the media.
Open the popup or use the on-page controls.
Choose the quality option you want.
Start the download and wait for the MP4 export to finish.
tutorial: Install Rajwap Downloader from the latest GitHub release for your browser.
Navigate to a Rajwap video page, for example a /video/{id}/{slug}.html URL.
Allow the page to load fully and start video playback.
Click the extension icon in your browser toolbar to open the popup.
The popup will display detected video sources from the page.
Select the quality or format option you prefer.
Click the download button to begin the export.
Save the resulting MP4 file to your preferred local folder.
supported_formats: Input: Video content from supported Rajwap video detail pages
Saved files use MP4 so they are easier to replay on standard media players, move between devices, or archive locally.
target_users: Rajwap users who want to save videos for offline viewing
People with unreliable internet connections who prefer local playback
Users who want to build a personal video library from Rajwap content
Anyone looking for a simple, single-site downloader without extra features
use_cases: Saving a video to watch later without streaming
Archiving content you have permission to keep
Watching videos on devices with limited connectivity
Building a local collection of Rajwap content
Avoiding repeated data usage for frequently watched videos
troubleshooting: The extension does not detect any video on the page. Make sure you are on a supported Rajwap video page and that the video player has started loading. Try refreshing the page and starting playback again.
The download button is not appearing. Open the extension popup by clicking the icon in your browser toolbar. If the popup shows no sources, the page may not be a supported video page.
The download fails or stops mid-way. Check your internet connection. Large video files may take time to download. Try again with a more stable connection.
The extension is not working on a specific Rajwap page. Not all Rajwap pages may be supported. The extension currently targets video detail pages with the standard /video/{id}/{slug}.html pattern.
I cannot find the extension after installing it. Look for the extension icon in your browser toolbar. You may need to pin it from the extensions menu.
trial_access: Includes 3 free downloads so you can test the workflow first
Email sign-in uses secure one-time password verification
No credit card required for the trial
Unlimited downloads are available with a paid license
installation_instructions: Download the correct build for your browser.
Use the popup to detect and download the media.
notes: Only download content you own or have explicit permission to save

Rajwap Downloader is a draft extension profile with verified handoff data; extraction behavior should be tested on live pages
This extension is not affiliated with or endorsed by Rajwap
about: Rajwap is a video hosting platform that offers a wide variety of content across multiple categories. Rajwap Downloader helps users save videos from the site for offline viewing, giving more flexibility in how they access and enjoy Rajwap content.
